# NodeDiscLayer.Activation property

FR-C16 R11 — the per-child activation condition. For the gate (`Template_Node_Quest`) the ornate children split by selection (`0xC2DF4786` → Selected, `0x0E6B6249` → Unselected) and the locator (`0x6D68F45F`) gates on Located; other children are [`Always`](../NodeActivation/Always.md).

```csharp
public NodeActivation Activation { get; set; }
```
